name: Storage adapter unreachable — object store down

_baseworks_meta.slo_note: Critical when the storage adapter reachability gauge (1=reachable, 0=down) drops below 1 in a 5m window. thresholdType:1 = alert when value is BELOW the threshold. Forward-looking: requires custom-metrics wiring (v1.4+ OTLP) to emit storage.adapter.reachable from the health contributor probe. Until then, monitor via /health/detailed data.storage.adapter.reachable (false rolls the storage contributor to unhealthy). Same honest caveat as redis-down.json.
